name: Christmas Bears Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bear-shaped chocolate graham crackers, snacks
2 cups Mini Oreos with red frosting
2 cups Red, white & green candy coated chocolates
1 cup Red and green gummi bears
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Store the mixture in a plastic bag or covered container.
